mapper.select: SELECT train_no, train_type, depart_station, arrive_station, depart_time, arrive_time, duration_min FROM train_routes WHERE is_valid = TRUE AND ( train_no ILIKE #{keyword} || '%' OR depart_station ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR arrive_station ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN train_no ILIKE #{keyword} || '%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, train_no LIMIT #{limit}
